name: Founder Sales CRM
description: Outreach-first sales pipeline built for founders. Manage contacts, track deals through a pipeline, run outreach campaigns, send reusable email templates, and never miss a follow-up.

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Clear overview of your pipeline at a glance: contacts, emails sent, replies, meetings booked, customers won, and follow-ups due today.

features.name: Contacts
features.description: Single source of truth for every lead. Search and filter by status or company, then open any contact to see their full history.

features.name: Pipeline
features.description: Visualizes your deals as they move from new lead to customer. Spot bottlenecks at a glance and keep every deal moving forward.

features.name: Campaigns
features.description: Organize your outreach by product and target market. Set a window, track status from draft to completed, and measure what works.

features.name: Templates
features.description: Write reusable emails with variables like first name and company. Preview exactly how a message looks before it goes out.

features.name: Outreach
features.description: The outreach queue is where your emails get sent. Queue one contact or hundreds, schedule them, and watch each move from pending to sent.

features.name: Follow-ups
features.description: Make sure nothing slips through the cracks. See tasks due today, add notes, and mark them complete as you turn replies into meetings.

features.name: Products
features.description: Products are the things you sell. Define each with a name, description, and website, then attach contacts, campaigns, and templates to it.
